overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world western game. A character holding a lantern walks along a wooden dock at night, passes through a gate into a frontier camp with tents and campfires, then exits into open fields. The atmosphere is dark and moody with mixed lighting from moonlight, lanterns, and firelight.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden dock holding lantern, approaching settlement gate

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the dock walkway
dark flowing water alongside the dock
simple wooden bench on the dock
vertical wooden posts supporting the dock
wooden frontier-style buildings with warm lights in the distance
lit lantern on a wooden post illuminating the dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden dock at night, holding a lantern that casts warm light on the weathered planks. The river flows on the right, while frontier buildings with glowing windows stand ahead in the distance.

events.description: passes through wooden archway gate from dock into settlement interior

agents.ego_description: walking through wooden gate structure into the camp area

entered.detail: large wooden archway marking the entrance to the settlement
stacked wooden barrels beside the gate
wooden crates and cargo boxes near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a wooden gate archway, transitioning from the open dock to the enclosed settlement entrance. Wooden barrels and crates line the path as the ground changes from planks to dirt.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier camp with tents and cooking fires

events.description: character passes close to campfire, warm firelight illuminates the scene

agents.ego_description: walking through camp past canvas tents and campfires, examining the surroundings

entered.detail: large canvas tent with open sides
cooking fire with wooden tripod and hanging pot
wooden stall structure with canvas roof
large metal cooking pot near the fire

segments.scene_description: Inside the camp, the character walks past canvas tents and a crackling campfire with a cooking tripod. The warm firelight mixes with the cool moonlight as the character moves between wooden stalls and supply crates.

events.description: exits camp through far wooden gate into open field

agents.ego_description: walking away from camp through exit gate into darker open field

entered.detail: wooden gate structure marking the far exit of the camp
expansive open grassland beyond the camp
dark silhouette of trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the far wooden exit gate, leaving the camp and its firelight behind. The scene opens into a darker open field with distant trees silhouetted against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit river dock through a bustling frontier camp and out into the dark open wilderness. It begins with the character walking along weathered wooden planks, guided by the warm glow of a handheld lantern while the river flows alongside. As the camera moves forward, the path transitions from wood to dirt upon passing through a wooden gate archway lined with barrels and crates. The scene then shifts into the heart of the settlement, where the cool moonlight blends with the flickering orange light of crackling campfires and canvas tents. Finally, the camera follows the character through a far exit gate, leaving the warmth of the camp behind as the environment opens into a vast, dark field with silhouetted trees against the night sky.
